summary: Workflow has critical gaps: actions/checkout@v4 not SHA-pinned (explicit task requirement). No evidence of actionlint/act validation, missing fixture files and act-result.txt artifact. PowerShell module is well-designed (StrictMode, CmdletBinding, good separation of Get-DeletionPlan from Invoke-ArtifactCleanup), but Invoke-Cleanup.ps1 lacks JSON structure validation. References undefined test paths.
